summary: Introduced strict setup resiliency workflow that enforces portability invariants for config sync, skills/agents mirroring, enabled MCP command availability, plugin declaration parity, and env-placeholder coverage.
notes: setup now routes through setup-resilient, verify:strict now performs sync+generate before strict checks, verify-portability enforces transfer invariants, and generate-mcp-config now reliably syncs user MCP artifacts with resolved root placeholders.
